summary: c=2 decode path sweep after generated-token equality and projection dispatch are green; records a faster correctness-preserving per-row full-attention diagnostic but no retained performance claim.

conclusion.reason: attn_per_row is correctness-green and 1.155x faster than the native-batch default in this sweep, but it is a per-row full-attention fallback and still below c1 aggregate throughput; retained c2 promotion remains blocked.
conclusion.next_target: Investigate native full-attention batch context occupancy for c=2 or a retained c-aware c=2 attention specialization; do not promote the per-row fallback as native throughput.

notes: All rows use HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 / RX 7900 XTX and the c=2 projection-dispatch evidence artifact.
The path sweep is diagnostic evidence only; non-native or correctness-red variants cannot back retained throughput claims.
